untranslatable_reason: The signal requires timing-based logic (entry 15, 30, or 60 minutes after market open) and tracking of intraday opening range, which cannot be expressed with the available indicators and operators. The backtest engine would need explicit time-of-day filtering and opening range tracking (high/low in first N minutes) to properly implement this strategy.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel as a proxy for new high/low breakout detection, but this does not capture the specific timing requirement (15/30/60 min after open) or the opening range concept. The signal requires intrabar timing logic that is outside the scope of these condition-based rules.
